title: General Consultation
shortDescription: Comprehensive health checkups and personalized medical advice for your overall well-being.
fullDescription: Our general consultation provides a thorough evaluation of your current health status. We focus on preventive care, early detection of potential issues, and lifestyle modifications to optimize your health span.

title: Advanced Cardiology
shortDescription: State-of-the-art heart diagnostics, ECGs, and personalized cardiovascular treatment plans.
fullDescription: Utilizing the latest in medical technology, our cardiology department offers comprehensive heart assessments including stress tests, echocardiograms, and Holter monitoring to ensure your heart is functioning optimally.

title: Preventative Care
shortDescription: Proactive screening and vaccinations to keep you healthy before symptoms appear.
fullDescription: We believe in stopping illnesses before they start. Our preventative care packages include full body scans, genetic screening, and customized vaccination schedules based on your lifestyle and travel needs.

title: Virtual Consultation
shortDescription: Secure, high-definition video consultations from the comfort of your home.
fullDescription: Can't make it to the clinic? Our telemedicine service brings world-class medical expertise to your living room. Perfect for follow-ups, prescription refills, and minor urgent care needs.
